commentary.text: Garcia clears by hand from a stoppage on outer wing inside to Phillipou who passes to the flank over Gray for Sharman 30m out, his first goal.
Caminiti gets a lucky OOTF free on Miller 15m out and checksides the goal off his right.
Phillipou roves on the flank and jinks inside past Broad for a nice left-foot finish from 35m.
Hall snaps the first goal of the afternoon from the hotspot.
Higgins collapses in a Vlastuin tackle 40m out on a slight angle and gets a rather soft contact free, footy gods push his set shot to the left.
#####St Kilda loses Mitch Owens but regains Jack Higgins, while the Tigers copped another two injuries last week to take their injury list to a full 18.
